differential_diagnoses: Nephrotic syndrome secondary to systemic AL amyloidosis
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Perform 24-hour urine collection for protein quantification
Perform kidney biopsy with Congo red staining and immunofluorescence
Perform echocardiography with assessment for longitudinal strain
Perform bone marrow biopsy and aspirate
Cardiac MRI if amyloidosis is suspected

differential_diagnoses: Systemic AL amyloidosis with cardiac and renal involvement
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Perform kidney biopsy with Congo red staining, immunofluorescence, and electron microscopy
Perform echocardiography with global longitudinal strain assessment
Obtain serum NT-proBNP and high-sensitivity troponin
Perform bone marrow biopsy and aspirate with flow cytometry
Perform abdominal fat pad aspiration for amyloid deposition
Perform cardiac MRI with late gadolinium enhancement
Collect 24-hour urine for total protein quantification
Consult nephrology and hematology-oncology for multidisciplinary management
